ast: sum_distinct(a)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                           |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                    |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Int64([10]), validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: sum_distinct(c)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                           |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| c      | Column(UInt64([1, 2, 1, 3]))                                   |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: UInt64([6]), validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: sum_distinct(x_null)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                            |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| x_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0011] }) |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: UInt64([3]), validity: [0b_______1] }                  |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: sum_distinct(all_null)
evaluation (internal):
+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column   | Data                                                                            |
+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| all_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0000] }) |
| Output   | NullableColumn { column: UInt64([0]), validity: [0b_______0] }                  |
+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: avg_distinct(c)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                            |
+--------+-----------------------------------------------------------------+
| c      | Column(UInt64([1, 2, 1, 3]))                                    |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Float64([2]), validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+-----------------------------------------------------------------+
